name: Category KPI Heatmap

data.dsp_query: SELECT category, SUM(revenue) AS revenue, AVG(gross_margin_pct) AS margin, COUNT(DISTINCT sku) AS sku_count, SUM(units) AS units, AVG(return_rate_pct) AS return_rate FROM public.category_metrics WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC

semantic.cypher: MATCH (c:Category) RETURN c.name, c.strategic_priority, c.growth_target LIMIT 20
